There shall be exempt from the payment of the levy
sections.text:
Exemption
persons paying premiums in respect of-
from levy
(a) pension funds and annuity policies which provide for
retirement benefits; and
(b) existing life contracts on which premium levels have
already been fixed prior to 1st January, 1991.
